title: MiniMCPack
description: A small modpack to improve the game and optimize it
body:
## Description **WARNING! The modpack is not finished yet. It is in testing stage.** A vanilla and lightweight modpack for the simple Minecraft worker. This modpack does not contain mods that not everyone needs, like Pico Voice. There are also no mods that make the game too easy, for example Xaero's World Map. ## What I give: ✔️ Optimization
✔️ Improved gameplay (no cheating)
## Why choose this modpack: ✔️ Very good optimization due to a small number of mods and the most top ways to increase FPS
✔️ Improved gameplay without cheating
✔️ No junk or cheating mods
## From the owner: Considering the options for modpacks, I never found an option that would suit me, and so I made my own collection of mods that would suit me. And I want to share it with you.
